items.subject: Urgent: O- below 1.5 days
items.snippet: We're 12 O-negative units short for tomorrow morning's surgeries. Any donors you can mobilize tonight would help.

items.subject: Saturday community drive — 9 AM to 2 PM
items.snippet: Bayland Community Center. 6 beds, 3 phlebotomists. ~24 slots still open.

items.subject: Lapsed donor push
items.snippet: Let's re-engage donors who haven't given in 60+ days but are now eligible.
